issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) depth parameter to specify 'top 3 cards', (2) filter for {Dressrosa} type, (3) reveal mechanic, (4) placement of remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only searches deck without these essential parameters.

Effect structure does not capture the multi-step sequence: look at 3 cards → reveal up to 1 Dressrosa → add to hand → place rest at bottom in any order. Requires proper depth, filtering, reveal condition, and reordering logic.
